description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: On the pricing page, find subscription plans that cost between $15 and $25 per month, include meal plans, and offer a 14‑day free trial, then start a trial of the cheapest matching plan and complete the sign‑up form with the provided name, email, and fitness goal.
tasks.name: On the pricing page, find subscription plans that cost between $15 and $25 per month, include meal plans, and offer a 14‑day free trial, then start a trial of the cheapest matching plan and complete the sign‑up form with the provided name, email, and fitness goal.
tasks.description: On the pricing page, find subscription plans that cost between $15 and $25 per month, include meal plans, and offer a 14‑day free trial, then start a trial of the cheapest matching plan and complete the sign‑up form with the provided name, email, and fitness goal.

tasks.instruction: In the workouts section, filter for beginner‑level, no‑equipment home workout plans with at least 3 sessions per week and save one of the matching plans to your personal list.
tasks.name: In the workouts section, filter for beginner‑level, no‑equipment home workout plans with at least 3 sessions per week and save one of the matching plans to your personal list.
tasks.description: In the workouts section, filter for beginner‑level, no‑equipment home workout plans with at least 3 sessions per week and save one of the matching plans to your personal list.

tasks.instruction: Using the weekly workout planner, select the week labeled from the 4th to the 10th and schedule one strength session on Monday, one cardio session on Wednesday, and one yoga session on Friday, each with a duration of 45 minutes or less.
tasks.name: Using the weekly workout planner, select the week labeled from the 4th to the 10th and schedule one strength session on Monday, one cardio session on Wednesday, and one yoga session on Friday, each with a duration of 45 minutes or less.
tasks.description: Using the weekly workout planner, select the week labeled from the 4th to the 10th and schedule one strength session on Monday, one cardio session on Wednesday, and one yoga session on Friday, each with a duration of 45 minutes or less.

tasks.instruction: Use the calorie calculator to estimate daily calories for a 30‑year‑old female weighing 65 kg at 170 cm who is moderately active and wants to lose 0.5 kg per week, then email the resulting plan to the specified address using the "Email me this plan" form.
tasks.name: Use the calorie calculator to estimate daily calories for a 30‑year‑old female weighing 65 kg at 170 cm who is moderately active and wants to lose 0.5 kg per week, then email the resulting plan to the specified address using the "Email me this plan" form.
tasks.description: Use the calorie calculator to estimate daily calories for a 30‑year‑old female weighing 65 kg at 170 cm who is moderately active and wants to lose 0.5 kg per week, then email the resulting plan to the specified address using the "Email me this plan" form.

tasks.instruction: On the pricing page, switch to annual billing, identify plans whose effective monthly cost is $40 or less, and continue with the plan that offers the highest number of 1:1 coaching sessions per month.
tasks.name: On the pricing page, switch to annual billing, identify plans whose effective monthly cost is $40 or less, and continue with the plan that offers the highest number of 1:1 coaching sessions per month.
tasks.description: On the pricing page, switch to annual billing, identify plans whose effective monthly cost is $40 or less, and continue with the plan that offers the highest number of 1:1 coaching sessions per month.

tasks.instruction: On the live classes page, select tomorrow’s date, filter for classes starting between 6:00 PM and 10:00 PM that are 45 minutes or less and have a rating of at least 4.5 stars, then book one matching class and complete the booking form with the provided name.
tasks.name: On the live classes page, select tomorrow’s date, filter for classes starting between 6:00 PM and 10:00 PM that are 45 minutes or less and have a rating of at least 4.5 stars, then book one matching class and complete the booking form with the provided name.
tasks.description: On the live classes page, select tomorrow’s date, filter for classes starting between 6:00 PM and 10:00 PM that are 45 minutes or less and have a rating of at least 4.5 stars, then book one matching class and complete the booking form with the provided name.

tasks.instruction: In the newsletter section, subscribe using the given email and first name, choose strength and mobility/flexibility as focus areas, set email frequency to 3 times per week, and enable only training tips and workout reminders notifications.
tasks.name: In the newsletter section, subscribe using the given email and first name, choose strength and mobility/flexibility as focus areas, set email frequency to 3 times per week, and enable only training tips and workout reminders notifications.
tasks.description: In the newsletter section, subscribe using the given email and first name, choose strength and mobility/flexibility as focus areas, set email frequency to 3 times per week, and enable only training tips and workout reminders notifications.

tasks.instruction: In the FAQ section, search for information about pausing membership, open a relevant answer, then use the chat widget there to ask whether you can pause your membership for 2 weeks starting next Monday without losing your progress data.

target_names: Can I pause my membership without losing my progress data?

expected_values.chat_message: Can I pause my membership for 2 weeks starting next Monday without losing my progress data?
